test-case.sql: select hr_staff_base.staff_name as `hr_staff_base.staff_name`, hr_staff_base.base_code as `hr_staff_base.base_code`, hr_staff_base.card_type as `hr_staff_base.card_type`, hr_staff_base.idCard as `hr_staff_base.idCard`, hr_staff_base.sex as `hr_staff_base.sex`, hr_staff_base.from_nation as `hr_staff_base.from_nation`, hr_staff_base.nation as `hr_staff_base.nation`, hr_staff_base.join_date as `hr_staff_base.join_date`, hr_staff_base.hsb_field_company_age_yearMonth as `hr_staff_base.hsb_field_company_age_yearMonth`, pt_staff_stru.BELONG_UNIT_ORG_NAME as `pt_staff_stru.BELONG_UNIT_ORG_NAME`, pt_staff_stru.DEPT_ORG_ONE as `pt_staff_stru.DEPT_ORG_ONE`, pt_staff_stru.DEPT_ORG_TWO as `pt_staff_stru.DEPT_ORG_TWO`, pt_staff_stru.DEPT_ORG_NAME as `pt_staff_stru.DEPT_ORG_NAME`, pt_staff_stru.POST_ORG_NAME as `pt_staff_stru.POST_ORG_NAME`, pt_staff_stru.first_type_id as `pt_staff_stru.first_type_id`, pt_staff_stru.second_type_id as `pt_staff_stru.second_type_id`, pt_staff_stru.third_type_id as `pt_staff_stru.third_type_id`, pt_staff_stru.fourth_type_id as `pt_staff_stru.fourth_type_id`, pt_staff_stru.fifth_type_id as `pt_staff_stru.fifth_type_id`, pt_staff_stru.POST_LEVEL_ID as `pt_staff_stru.POST_LEVEL_ID`, pt_staff_stru.PT_POST_GRADE_ID as `pt_staff_stru.PT_POST_GRADE_ID`, pt_staff_stru.PRINCIPAL_STAFF_NAME as `pt_staff_stru.PRINCIPAL_STAFF_NAME`, hr_staff_base.identity as `hr_staff_base.identity`, hr_staff_base.staff_status as `hr_staff_base.staff_status`, hr_staff_base.period as `hr_staff_base.period`, hr_staff_base.pre_correction_date as `hr_staff_base.pre_correction_date`, hr_staff_base.Regular_Time as `hr_staff_base.Regular_Time`, hr_staff_base.mobile_phone as `hr_staff_base.mobile_phone`, hr_staff_base.hsb_ext_Email as `hr_staff_base.hsb_ext_Email`, hr_staff_base.work_date as `hr_staff_base.work_date`, hr_staff_base.hsb_field_work_age_yearMonth as `hr_staff_base.hsb_field_work_age_yearMonth`, hr_staff_base.highedu as `hr_staff_base.highedu`, hr_staff_edu.speciality as `hr_staff_edu.speciality`, hr_staff_edu.gra_school as `hr_staff_edu.gra_school`, hr_staff_base.person_status as `hr_staff_base.person_status`, hr_staff_base.polity as `hr_staff_base.polity`, hr_staff_base.marriage as `hr_staff_base.marriage`, pt_staff_stru.stru_identity as `pt_staff_stru.stru_identity`, hr_staff_base.call_person as `hr_staff_base.call_person`, hr_staff_base.call_phone as `hr_staff_base.call_phone`, hr_staff_base.call_relationship as `hr_staff_base.call_relationship`, hr_staff_base.live_place as `hr_staff_base.live_place`, hr_staff_base.health as `hr_staff_base.health`, hr_staff_base.id_address as `hr_staff_base.id_address`, hr_staff_base.leaveOffice_date as `hr_staff_base.leaveOffice_date`, hr_staff_base.highest_pt_titleName as `hr_staff_base.highest_pt_titleName`, hr_staff_base.highest_pt_level as `hr_staff_base.highest_pt_level`, hr_staff_base.hsb_field_recruit_source as `hr_staff_base.hsb_field_recruit_source`, hr_staff_base.hsb_field_recruit_type as `hr_staff_base.hsb_field_recruit_type`, pt_staff_stru.ORG_FULL_PATH as `pt_staff_stru.ORG_FULL_PATH`, hr_staff_base.birthday as `hr_staff_base.birthday`, pt_staff_stru.DEPT_ORG_THREE as `pt_staff_stru.DEPT_ORG_THREE`, pt_staff_stru.DEPT_ORG_FOUR as `pt_staff_stru.DEPT_ORG_FOUR`, pt_staff_stru.DEPT_ORG_FIVE as `pt_staff_stru.DEPT_ORG_FIVE`, pt_staff_stru.POST_STRU_ID as `pt_staff_stru.POST_STRU_ID`, hr_staff_base.regist_property as `hr_staff_base.regist_property`, hr_staff_base.firstEdu as `hr_staff_base.firstEdu`, hr_staff_base.firstDegree as `hr_staff_base.firstDegree`, hr_staff_base.jobEdu as `hr_staff_base.jobEdu`, hr_staff_base.jobDegree as `hr_staff_base.jobDegree`, hr_staff_edu.edu_e_date as `hr_staff_edu.edu_e_date`, hr_staff_base.base_id as `hr_staff_base.base_id`, pt_staff_stru.STRU_ID as `pt_staff_stru.STRU_ID`, pt_post_level.LEVEL_ORDER as `pt_post_level.LEVEL_ORDER`, pt_structure.GLOBAL_ORDER as `pt_structure.GLOBAL_ORDER`, pt_structure.STRU_ORDER as `pt_structure.STRU_ORDER`, pt_structure.STRU_LEVEL as `pt_structure.STRU_LEVEL`, pt_staff_stru.IN_USE as `pt_staff_stru.IN_USE`, pt_staff_stru.STRU_TREE_CODE as `pt_staff_stru.STRU_TREE_CODE`, pt_staff_stru.PRINCIPAL_STAFF_ID as `pt_staff_stru.PRINCIPAL_STAFF_ID`, pt_staff_stru.STRU_ORDER as `pt_staff_stru.STRU_ORDER`, pt_staff_stru.GLOBAL_ORDER as `pt_staff_stru.GLOBAL_ORDER`, hr_staff_base.defriend_status as `hr_staff_base.defriend_status`, hr_staff_base.name_spell as `hr_staff_base.name_spell`, hr_staff_contract.contract_start_date as `hr_staff_contract.contract_start_date`, hr_staff_contract.contract_end_date as `hr_staff_contract.contract_end_date` from hr_staff_base AS hr_staff_base JOIN pt_staff_stru AS pt_staff_stru on hr_staff_base.base_id = pt_staff_stru.STAFF_ID LEFT JOIN pt_post_level AS pt_post_level on pt_staff_stru.POST_LEVEL_ID = pt_post_level.LEVEL_ID LEFT JOIN hr_staff_edu AS hr_staff_edu on hr_staff_base.base_id = hr_staff_edu.base_id AND hr_staff_edu.is_highEdu in ('1') AND hr_staff_edu.IN_USE = '1' LEFT JOIN pt_staff_stru AS pt_staff_stru1 on pt_staff_stru.PRINCIPAL_STAFF_ID = pt_staff_stru1.STAFF_ID AND pt_staff_stru1.POST_STRU_ID = '1' LEFT JOIN pt_structure AS pt_structure on pt_structure.STRU_ID = pt_staff_stru.DEPT_STRU_ID LEFT JOIN hr_staff_contract AS hr_staff_contract on hr_staff_base.current_contract_id = hr_staff_contract.contract_id AND hr_staff_base.base_id = hr_staff_contract.base_id AND hr_staff_contract.IN_USE = '1' where 1 = 1 and pt_staff_stru.`STRU_TREE_CODE` like 'pdzx%' AND (pt_staff_stru.`POST_STRU_ID` in ('1') OR pt_staff_stru.`IN_USE` in ('1')) AND ((pt_staff_stru.POST_STRU_ID in ('1')) AND ((find_in_set('1', hr_staff_base.person_status) or find_in_set('4', hr_staff_base.person_status)))) ORDER BY pt_structure.global_order asc, pt_structure.stru_order asc, pt_structure.stru_level asc, pt_staff_stru.stru_order asc, pt_post_level.level_order asc, hr_staff_base.base_id LIMIT 0,15;

select hr_staff_selfhelp2.*, hr_staff_selfhelp.operator_name, hr_staff_selfhelp.is_collect_info, CASE WHEN hr_staff_selfhelp2.approve_status = '1' THEN NULL ELSE hr_staff_selfhelp.approve_name END approve_name, CASE WHEN hr_staff_selfhelp2.approve_status = '1' THEN NULL ELSE hr_staff_selfhelp.approve_time END approve_time FROM hr_staff_selfhelp RIGHT JOIN (select hr_staff_base.staff_name, hr_staff_base.base_code, pt_staff_stru.ROOT_ID, pt_staff_stru.BELONG_UNIT_ORG_NAME, pt_staff_stru.DEPT_ORG_NAME, pt_staff_stru.POST_ORG_NAME, pt_staff_stru.ORG_FULL_PATH, hr_staff_base.idCard, pt_staff_stru.POST_LEVEL_NAME, pt_staff_stru.EXT1 postType, hr_staff_base.join_date, hr_staff_edu.education, hr_staff_edu.speciality, hr_staff_edu.edu_e_date, CASE WHEN find_in_set('1', GROUP_CONCAT(hr_staff_selfhelp.approve_status)) > 0 THEN '1' WHEN find_in_set('4', GROUP_CONCAT(hr_staff_selfhelp.approve_status)) > 0 THEN '4' WHEN find_in_set('2', GROUP_CONCAT(hr_staff_selfhelp.approve_status)) > 0 THEN '2' WHEN find_in_set('5', GROUP_CONCAT(hr_staff_selfhelp.approve_status)) > 0 THEN '5' ELSE '3' end approve_status, MAX(hr_staff_selfhelp.submit_time) submit_time, MAX(hr_staff_selfhelp.operate_time) operate_time, hr_staff_selfhelp.base_id, min(hr_staff_selfhelp.create_time) create_time, hr_staff_selfhelp.selfhelp_num, hr_staff_selfhelp.creater_id, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN hr_staff_selfhelp.ext4 = '' THEN NULL ELSE hr_staff_selfhelp.ext4 END) ext4, task.id task_id, IFNULL(config.step, task.step) step, IFNULL(config.step_name, task.step_name) step_name from hr_staff_selfhelp join hr_staff_base on hr_staff_selfhelp.base_id = hr_staff_base.base_id and hr_staff_base.IN_USE = 1 left join pt_staff_stru on hr_staff_base.base_id = pt_staff_stru.staff_id and pt_staff_stru.POST_STRU_ID = 1 and pt_staff_stru.IN_USE = 1 left join hr_staff_edu on hr_staff_edu.base_id = hr_staff_base.base_id and hr_staff_edu.IN_USE = 1 and hr_staff_edu.is_highEdu = 1 LEFT JOIN hr_staff_selfhelp_task task ON task.selfhelp_num = hr_staff_selfhelp.selfhelp_num AND task.state = 'RUNNING' LEFT JOIN hr_staff_selfhelp_config config ON config.id = task.config_id where hr_staff_selfhelp.edit_status = 2 and hr_staff_selfhelp.in_use = '1' AND pt_staff_stru.ROOT_ID = 'pdzx' AND (pt_staff_stru.STRU_TREE_CODE like 'pdzx-00014%') AND (EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM hr_staff_selfhelp_task WHERE hr_staff_selfhelp_task.selfhelp_num = hr_staff_selfhelp.selfhelp_num and ((hr_staff_selfhelp_task.id = task.id and modules is not null) or (hr_staff_selfhelp_task.id = task.id and modules is null) or task.id is null) and (hr_staff_selfhelp_task.participant_id = 'c3dfba3566d74d098761881293728220' or hr_staff_selfhelp_task.participant_id = 'renshi' or hr_staff_selfhelp_task.participant_id = 'gonggong')) OR (SELECT IFNULL(count(1), 0) FROM hr_staff_selfhelp_task WHERE hr_staff_selfhelp_task.selfhelp_num = hr_staff_selfhelp.selfhelp_num and hr_staff_selfhelp_task.state <> 'BACK' and (modules is null or hr_staff_selfhelp_task.modules like concat('%', hr_staff_selfhelp.table_id, '%'))) = '0') GROUP BY hr_staff_selfhelp.selfhelp_num) hr_staff_selfhelp2 ON hr_staff_selfhelp.base_id = hr_staff_selfhelp2.base_id and hr_staff_selfhelp.selfhelp_num = hr_staff_selfhelp2.selfhelp_num AND hr_staff_selfhelp.operate_time = hr_staff_selfhelp2.operate_time where 1 = 1 and hr_staff_selfhelp2.approve_status = '1' GROUP BY hr_staff_selfhelp2.selfhelp_num ORDER BY hr_staff_selfhelp2.operate_time DESC LIMIT 0,15;
